text: The course content is perfect , however the rating system is kind of disappointing . First , the rating is very subjective , thus I might pay great efforts to my submission but get a grade below my expectation . Second , sometimes I can be busy on weekends thus I want to finish the peer review earlier on Friday , however , there might often be not enough submission to be reviewed , thus I am very pressured to do this with a exhausted mind and body in the evening on Sundays . Could I just pass if there ' s no other submission to review ?
